name: ego_speed
description: Vehicle longitudinal speed used for stopping-distance calculation

name: target_distance
description: Distance between ego vehicle and target/object ahead

name: relative_speed
description: Closing speed between ego vehicle and target/object

name: road_condition
description: Road condition used to select friction coefficient

name: friction_mu
description: Friction coefficient associated with dry or wet road condition

name: actuator_delay
description: Controller and actuator delay used in stopping-distance calculation

name: brake_request
description: Emergency brake request generated only in EMERGENCY_BRAKE state
